<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Attach resume to candidate"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/candidates/resume"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Upload and attach a resume file to an existing candidate.
Valid file types are **pdf**, **docx**, and **doc**.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
